data.content: The file is generated successfully (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but the compiler doesn't see it. The `GenerateSampleCode` target never adds the file to the `Compile` item group, so MSBuild doesn't pass it to the compiler.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and track it for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs before `CoreCompile` and generates the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. The file is created on disk but MSBuild doesn't know to include it in compilation.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group and also to `FileWrites` (so it gets cleaned properly) within the target.

Let me use the skill for this since it's directly relevant.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and track it for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and track it for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

toolArgs.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and track it for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds and runs correctly. The problem was that the `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote the `.cs` file to disk but never told MSBuild to compile it. The fix adds two items inside the target:

- **`<Compile Include="...">`** — adds the generated file to the compiler's input list
- **`<FileWrites Include="...">`** — ensures `dotnet clean` removes it
